sn45.50-54:1.4: “Enthusiasm” (chanda) is the desire to achieve the wholesome, especially liberation from transmigration. It is one of the bases of psychic power (SN 51).
sn45.50-54:1.5: “Accomplishment in self-development” (attasampadā) is found only here and in parallel passages. In similar contexts we find cittasampadā (“accomplishment in mental development”), i.e. samādhi (AN 3.117:4.3). Hence the commentary glosses attā with citta here.
sn45.50-54:1.6: Normally one “accomplished in view” is a stream-enterer (SN 13.10:3.1).
